description: person_quality on Ole C. Hole (KD96-TV4) -- 2 completeness issues (missing burial date, marriage place missing a city). Paired with a person_warnings fixture that fires hasEventAfterDeath1, so both the impossibility and the quality issues are present at once. Used by ut_check_warnings_015.

issues.sentence: The death place is missing a city.
A residence has no tagged sources.
